name: 粘性炸弹跟随
description: 当棋子移动时更新炸弹位置
code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!context.battle.stickyBombs || context.battle.stickyBombs.length === 0) return { success: false }; var mover = context.sourcePiece; if (!mover) return { success: false }; var updated = false; for (var i = 0; i < context.battle.stickyBombs.length; i++) { var bomb = context.battle.stickyBombs[i]; if (bomb.attachedPieceId === mover.instanceId) { bomb.x = mover.x; bomb.y = mover.y; updated = true; } } return { success: false }; }
